title: antidesma subcordatum var. genuinum
intro: Antidesma subcordatum var. genuinum, also known as the Philippine staff vine, is a plant species in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is a type of climber that is native to the Philippines and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is also used in modern medicine to support the immune system and reduce inflammation.
